title: AMAGIC 24 Pack Colour Change Flicker Bright Flameless LED Candle Battery Operated, Fake Electric Tea Lights, for Christmas Party, Halloween, Birthday, Table Decoration
features: Compact Dimensions:Measuring 1.5 inches (3.8cm) in diameter and 1.3 inches (3.3cm) in height, these tea lights are perfectly sized to fit most standard holders, offering versatile use for creative DIY projects.
Extended Longevity:With a remarkable 200+ hour lifespan, these battery-operated candles outlast traditional wax candles by over 40 times, ensuring reliable performance without frequent replacements.

Versatile Ambiance:Featuring a realistic flickering effect that mimics traditional candles, they create a warm and inviting atmosphere for everyday use or special occasions such as Christmas, Halloween, birthdays, Thanksgiving, and weddings.

Safe & Practical Design:The flame-free technology eliminates fire hazards and messy wax residue, making these candles a cleaner, safer, and more convenient choice for households with children and pets.
Important Safety Note:To replace batteries, carefully unscrew the base. Always store the candles and batteries securely out of reach of children and pets to prevent accidental ingestion.
description: Product Description 7 Colour Changing LED Tea Light Featuring a sophisticated colour rotation system, these lights transition seamlessly through seven hues - red, yellow, blue, green, pink, cyan, and purple. The gentle, gradual colour changes create a soothing visual experience that's easy on the eyes. Wick Shape Mimics the shape of a candle's mouth when it actually burns, for a more realistic look. One-piece Moulding Design The head and body of the lamp are cast in one piece to prevent the head from falling off and preventing the candle from glowing. Reinforced Bottom Upgraded bottom shape requires more force to rotate open, thus avoiding hidden dangers caused by falling batteries. Battery Powered Uses button cell batteries, no flame, lasts over 40 times longer than traditional candles. Festive Illumination Essentials These vibrant LED candles are perfect for seasonal celebrations, including Halloween, Christmas and festivities. Offering a safer alternative to traditional candles, they combine extended durability with effortless convenience, making them the ideal choice for creating magical holiday atmospheres. Home Decoration The size of these battery tealights is 1.5inch(3.8cm) * 1.3inch(3.3cm), you can match most of the tea trays on the market to go for DIY decorations, that can last for more than 200+ hours, but be careful to keep them away from children and pets to avoid accidental ingestion.
